output: Batch 1 verification is complete. The Phase 1 source changes for T1-T4 were already present in the workspace exactly as approved, so no additional source edits were required. Scoped verification passed: ESLint was clean for the touched files, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/lora src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal src/domains/media-lightbox/contexts/__tests__/ImageEditContext.test.tsx` passed with 20/20 files and 114/114 tests. I also reran the full `npm test` suite in `reigh-app`; it completed with 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, all outside the Phase 1 files touched by this batch.
deviations: No source edits were needed during this execution because the approved Phase 1 code changes were already present in the workspace when inspected.

Full-suite verification did not go green: `npm test` completed with 19 failed files and 36 failed tests in unrelated areas such as tasks-pane controller expectations, generation-token panel copy, timeline prelude rendering, and task param contract telemetry. Those failures are outside the T1-T4 files and were not changed in this batch.

task_updates.executor_notes: Confirmed `LoraSelectorModal.tsx` already satisfies the Phase 1 fix: there is no `if (!isOpen) return null;` above the dialog root, `<Dialog open={isOpen}>` remains mounted, and only `DialogContent` is gated by `isOpen`. Scoped lint/test verification passed.

Confirmed `PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx` already satisfies the matching dialog-root fix: no early null return remains above `<Dialog>`, and only the heavy `DialogContent` subtree is conditional on `isOpen`. Scoped lint/test verification passed.

Confirmed the shared dialog wrapper already has the required top-of-file guard comment documenting that Base UI dialog cleanup runs on `open=false`, not unmount, and that expensive children should be gated at `DialogContent` instead of early-returning above `<Dialog open>`.

Confirmed `ImageEditFormContext.tsx` already exports strict `useImageEditForm()` that throws without a provider, retains `useImageEditFormSafe()` as the explicit fallback, and that the production consumer/re-export surfaces use the strict hook while the test keeps the Safe case with an inline justification. Scoped lint/test verification passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `LoraSelectorModal.tsx` no longer contains `if (!isOpen) return null;` above the dialog. The file keeps `<Dialog open={isOpen}>` mounted and gates only `DialogContent` with `isOpen`.
Confirmed `PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx` follows the same pattern: no early return above `<Dialog>`, with the heavy modal content gated at `DialogContent` only.
Confirmed the top of `reigh-app/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx` has a 4-line block comment stating the Base UI cleanup rule and the `DialogContent` gating fallback.

Confirmed `useImageEditForm()` throws when context is missing, `useImageEditFormSafe()` remains the explicit opt-in fallback, and the non-test production consumer plus the composed `ImageEditContext.tsx` surface were migrated to the strict hook.
